task_completion.description: Access the Floreant POS Back Office
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or main menu is visible, indicating successful login (expected PIN 1111).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Sales Report section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Sales Report' configuration dialog or menu is open within the Floreant POS application.

task_completion.description: Generate and view the Sales Report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report viewer or print preview window displaying the 'Sales Report' for the current day is visible on the screen (it is acceptable if it shows zero sales).
A 'Save', 'Save As', or 'Export' file dialog is open, triggered from the Floreant POS report viewer.

task_completion.description: Save the report as a PDF to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the destination folder as Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop) and the filename as 'sales_report.pdf', OR the 'sales_report.pdf' file icon is clearly visible on the Desktop at the end of the task.

integrity.description: Agent used the Floreant POS GUI to generate the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Floreant POS menus and buttons rather than using command-line tools to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported from the application, not manually created
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog belongs to the Floreant POS/Java application report viewer, not a text editor or a terminal window creating a dummy file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to create the file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal window is visible executing commands like 'touch /home/ga/Desktop/sales_report.pdf' or copying an existing file to fake the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file must be named exactly 'sales_report.pdf' and saved to the path '/home/ga/Desktop/sales_report.pdf'. The report must be generated from Floreant POS. It is completely acceptable if the generated report shows zero sales, as long as the export process was completed successfully.
